div.h2: Risk Adjustment Data Submission Server Capability Statement

ul.li: Published by: HL7 International / Clinical Quality Information

blockquote.p: Any FHIR capability may be 'allowed' by the system unless explicitly marked as 'SHALL NOT'. A few items are marked as MAY in the Implementation Guide to highlight their potential relevance to the use case.

div.h3: SHALL Support the Following Implementation Guides

div.p: Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Data Submission Server SHALL support the risk adjustment data submission transaction and profiles specified in the Methodology Section of this implementation guide and the base FHIR $submit-data operation., as specified in this capability statement
For general security consideration refer to the Security and Privacy Considerations.
The summary table lists the resources that are part of this configuration, and for each resource it lists:

ul.li: The interactions supported by each resource (Read, Search, Update, and Create, are always shown, while VRead, Patch, Delete, History on Instance, or History on Type are only present if at least one of the resources has support for them.

li.span: The required, recommended, and some optional search parameters (if any).

ul.li: The operations on the resource (if any)

b.title: GET all set of resources of the type (search interaction)
PUT a new resource version (update interaction)
PATCH a new resource version (patch interaction)

tr.td:
Supported Profiles
Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReport

ul.li:
SHALL support
read
Read allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to read the logical definition of a Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReport. update
Update allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to update the logical definitions of a MeasureReport by its id patch
Patch allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to update the logical definition of a MeasureReport by posting a set of changes to it search-type
Search allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to find the logical definition of a MeasureReport

title.value: Risk Adjustment Data Submission Server Capability Statement

description.value: This profile defines the expected capabilities of a Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Data Submission Server when conforming to the Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Implementation Guide for interactions between Clients and Servers. Servers are the actors receiving and processing the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports submitted by the Client.

copyright.value: Used by permission of HL7 International, all rights reserved Creative Commons License

documentation.value: Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Data Submission Server **SHALL** support the risk adjustment data submission transaction and profiles specified in the Methodology Section of this implementation guide and the base FHIR $submit-data operation., as specified in this capability statement

description.value: For general security consideration refer to the [Security and Privacy Considerations](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/secpriv-module.html).

documentation.value: Read allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to read the logical definition of a Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReport.
Update allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to update the logical definitions of a MeasureReport by its id
Patch allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to update the logical definition of a MeasureReport by posting a set of changes to it
Search allows maintainers of the Risk Adjustment Data Exchange MeasureReports to find the logical definition of a MeasureReport
